Мастер фраза для определения максимально: Well, that old thing almost tore me to pieces for its gold! gold! gol
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, я помню! Ты: Oh, I remember now! I had a dream about you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет! То есть да: No! I mean, yeah! So this wasn't a dream!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну девушки, кот:
Well, the girls you convert, what do you do with them?
You do something, don't you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не переживай, я: Don't worry, I'm a quick learner! I'm here to change my life, baby!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Или не называть: Or should I not call you baby? It's too off-hand, isn't it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну, конечно, Ро:
Well, of course, Roxy, don't be stupid! You just met!
This is not how people behave in a society!
Start over. You don't remember me, you slept through it, but I'm 
Roxy! And you are Eirik, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да? Верно? Ты ч: Yes? Right? Did you say something?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Ой, это, на:
Yes! Oh, that's probably bad, right? Other girls wear clothes,
right? Oh, of course they do, Roxy!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нестрашно. Ты и: It's fine. You look great already!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет-нет-нет! Вс: No no no! Everything must be right! I'll be like your other girls!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну Ханна, Ульфа:
Well, Hannah and Ulfa, you were talking about them! I heard...
You don't mind that I overheard, do you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я уверена, что: I'm sure we'll become friends with them!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Имена у них кла:
Their names are cool. Ulfa is a cool name. Hannah is a cool name.
My name is Roxy, did I mention?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Рокси — мое имя:
Roxy is my name. I came up with it myself um... yesterday.
Isn't that a good name?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Классное, да! Я: Good, yes! I'm Roxy! What do we do, Eirik?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Хорошо, Рокси,: Okay, Roxy, let me think. So, first of all, we'll find you some clothes.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_О! Я видела тут: Oh! I saw something around here! Wait a moment.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Выглядит мило!: Looks cute! Where did you find this?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Оно давно тут л: It's been here for a while.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Эй, не смотри т:
Hey, don't look at me like that! These rags are very clean and
almost new for rags!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_А дальше ты, на:
And then you’ll probably wait for me here while I explore the 
caves.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты пойдешь один: Will you go alone? Do you always go alone?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_С Ульфой? А со:
With Ulfa? What about me? Am I worse than Ulfa?
I'm no worse than Ulfa, right? Say it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет! Просто я с: No! I just heard it's dangerous here.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да я кучу раз з: But I've been here a bunch of times!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да? Ты знаешь э: Oh? Do you know these places?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну конечно! Я ж: Well, of course! I'm a local mouse!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ясно, то есть т:
Okay, so can you take me through? Then great!
Let's go explore the caves.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Это в сто р:
Yes! This is a hundred times better than being a scared mouse
sitting in a cellar! I mean \fimuch\fr better!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Класс! Эйрик и: Cool! Eirik and Roxy exploring the caves! Yay!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Ого! Она гипер: (Wow! She's hyperactive! Like a wound spring!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну что стоим? И: Well, why are we standing? Shall we go? Let's go? Or not?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Кстати, а зачем:
By the way, why are we exploring the caves? Well, I mean, I like
the idea, I really do, but we need to know what we're looking for.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_На что обращать: What to seek for, you know?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, наверное. В:
Yeah, I guess so. So, we think we know who did it.
Now we need to find evidence.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Что?! Не может,:
What?! It can't be! Do you know something?
Has he poisoned someone before?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да постоянно. М:
All the time. It happened many times. Say, two weeks ago.
He just comes into the house and poisons everyone.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я сразу перебег:
I always run to the cellar of the neighboring house when he 
comes.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Те, кто поглупе:
The more stupid mice, \fiall of them, to be honest,\fr so yeah, all 
of them lie around with poisoning. But they rarely die, the 
poison's bad.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты вот тоже ото: Turns out you also made it alive. That's his style, I'd say.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох... ты про то:
Oh... you're talking about him poisoning mice. He's an alchemist,
he goes door to door and... well, yeah.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вдруг ему надое:
What if he got tired and decided to treat his shitty poison
to someone bigger than a mouse?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Интересная теор: Interesting theory, but we have another suspect.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Габл, у него ес: Gubble, he has a motive and...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Габл, да... что: Gubble, yeah... What do you mean "fork-in-the-eye guy"?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Как-то он хваст:
Once he boasted to his friends that he could kill a mouse
with a fork, and then he went:
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*басит* \"Кстат:
*in a deep voice*
“By the way, I heard one here”... and then bam!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Метнул вилку пр:
He threw the fork straight at the mouse. Not at me, no, 
it was someone else.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну она сама дур:
Well, she set herself up, which was stupid. It’s no surprise
that he heard her. But he's a darn good fork darter, yes!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Жуть! Наверное,: Horrible! It must have been scary?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ага, жуть! Я ти:
Yeah, creepy! I dashed out of there on the sly.
After I finished my meal first, of course.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох... Как-то он:
Oh... He once said that he didn't need to see me to drive his
spear into me. It seems to work for him just by ear.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Так не врал. За: So this wasn't a lie. Why'd he poison you if he could just kill you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Мы думаем он хо: We think he wanted to deceive everyone with this.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Обмануть? Ха-ха:
Deceive? Ha-ha, no! Lying isn't about him. 
Beating someone - yes!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Бац, понял. Сам:
Bam, got it. The coolest warrior of the tribe, got it. 
Where are we now?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нам нужно туда,: We need to go there, into this gap.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Чего? Ох, в эту:
What? Oh, this one... 
It seems you are not yet used to the new scale.
I can't get through there, Roxy. No way.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_О... О! Ну да,:
Oh... Oh! Well, yes, stupid Roxy, of course he won’t get 
through there!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, но эти паук:
Yes, but there's spiders. You are so big and noisy, I must say.
They will notice you and pester you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Подожди! А Ульф:
Wait! And Ulfa, when you explore the caves, does she fight?
Oh yeah, she's a wolf, Roxy!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, давай! Идем: Come on! Let's go there! Roxy and Eirik will fight the spiders!!!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Какая разница!:
Who cares! We are not looking for safe ways! We need to
explore the caves, check every corner!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Справедливо. Мы: Fair enough. We don’t even know what we are looking for.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Рокси и Эйр:
Yes! Roxy and Eirik the fighting squad! Screw stealth,
let's clear this dungeon!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Хорошая раб: Yes! Good job, Roxy! I'm a beast, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Слушай, почему:
Listen, why do you always talk about yourself in the third 
person? Roxy this, Roxy that?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не знаю. Мне нр:
Don't know. I like my name. It’s so new, it’s crunchy on the 
tongue! Is it bad? Confusing?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепотом* Тихо!:
*whispers*
Quiet! Someone is talking up ahead! If you want to listen in,
you need to move more quietly!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепотом* Ну ты:
*whispers*
Well, you wanted to snoop around here, right?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Святые набухшие: Holy swollen buds, not that again!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нужно говорить:
You need to speak from the heart! And mind the rhyme!
The longing! And...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Очертить алфави:
\fiWith my tongue in one's mouth
I could spell a sonet,
If only all the hints worked
And you just got it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет не то! Хоро:
No, not that! Good, but not like that! You can’t say this right 
away, she’s ashamed of her nature! You need to tear her out of 
this! One more time...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну не вечно ляг:
\fiOne shall not act a frog forever
Until their very last day!
Would you listen to my alluring suggestion,
The one I've been meaning to say!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я ее как будто: It's like I'm blaming her! Not good! Maybe something like:
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_...хватить бало: ...\fiquit being so posh, let's start some debauche...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Это Габл! Ага,: (It's Gubble! Uh-huh, this is getting interesting!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Фу, нет! Это то:
Ugh, no! This will only scare her away! We need something poetic,
something deep, heart wrecking!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Что-то в духе::
Something like: "You are, like, a ray of sunshine, tender and 
warm! And I’m cold-blooded, and we bathe in the sun, and..."
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Вот оно! \":
Yes! This is it! "When it's cold, we frogs fall into stasis, and when
heat accelerates the blood flow we..."
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_\"И... и когда:
"And... and when it gets hot, I start moving faster...
If you get the hint!"
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_А? Габл, я... А:
Huh? Gubble, I... What's wrong?! I am a poet, a storyteller!
This is an ancient tradition!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты не сказатель: You are not a storyteller, you are a fornicator!
In your mind. Fornicator in your mind.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Почему бы тебе: Why won't you find a normal girl? A good, real frog?
A frog is... Yes, a frog is a great option.
Oh, never mind. How was it? How's your speech?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Дрянь. Меня пре:
Garbage. I was interrupted. I couldn't even say these words of 
your "main theses".
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет. Речь надо: No. The speech needs to be changed!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вот так на лету: Just like that, on the go? What did you manage to say?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_\"Если подпусти: "If you let humans near the springs, they will dry up”.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты застрял в са: You got stuck at the very beginning?!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Говорил же, над: I told you it needs to be shorter!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Справедливости:
To be fair, your political position can be summed up to:
“Let’s leave it as is”...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Так может сказа:
Any fool can say that! And I must reach the hearts
of my fellow tribesmen!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Достучатся до с:
\fiTo reach the hearts of my fellow tribesmen...\fr
Not bad, write it down. Okay, do you want a new speech?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да. Все изменил:
Yes. This rite changed everything. At first I was happy and
thought this was the true will of the Tree, and then I 
reconsidered...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Это глупо! Если:
This is silly! If it was the will of the Tree, he would've died 
already! Someone poisoned the cup...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты ведь не дума: You don't think it's me, do you?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ха-ха! С чего б: Ha ha! Why would I think that?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Речь надо менят:
The speech needs to be changed. Now it sounds too... 
aggressive.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Теперь можно по:
Now they might think that it was I who poisoned him!
And now I’m trying to deceive everyone and stage a coup!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_И как должна вы: And what should the new speech look like?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну что вроде то:
Well, something like traditions violation is bad, but such a low 
act is also not good.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вождь неправ, ч:
The leader is wrong for inviting this monkey here, but we can’t
just kill him now, spitting on everything, doing whatever we 
please!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Эм... Знаешь, е:
Um... You know, if that's really what you wish to say, then
you don't have to give any speech at all.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_То, что ты хоче:
What you want to say is pretty much clear. You can react to
the hearts of your fellow tribesmen with wise silence.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_К тому же, буде: Plus, there will be fewer reasons to suspect you.
You think so? Oh... Maybe you're right. I shouldn't have just 
come here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Что ты тут дела: What are you doing here, monkey!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Кто дал тебе пр:
Who gave you the right to meddle in our affairs?!
Who do you think you are, hmm?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты грязная, вон: You filthy, stinky monkey! Lousy bastard!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Прячешься за пр:
Hiding behind the leader's orders! If he hadn't forbidden me
to touch you, then...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я бы пригвоздил: I would have nailed you on the spot!!!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да! Ваше племя:
Yes! Your species does not know how to fight honestly,
you only attack as a pack!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Так что завязыв:
So quit being sarcastic! I see through you! You smile and 
swagger, but if it came to a fight, you would crawl away like 
a slug!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты выхватываешь: You draw your sword and rush forward!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Нет! Он УЖЕ за: (No! He is ALREADY behind your back!..)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Наверное, ты пл: You probably didn't think well when you drew your weapon?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Нет, я не конч:
(I'm not stupid! I won't be the first to draw a sword just because
this bastard is talking bullshit!)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, думаю о том:
Yeah, I'm just wondering what it's like to be such a windbag.
If you want to nail me, here I am!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну и завали тог:
Well, then shut up your slurp! If you're not going to do shit,
why goggle?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Чего ты хочешь?: What do you want? Chat me to death?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну вот! Говорил: Here you go! I told you it wasn’t him!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ну во-первых, о: Well, first of all, he could kill you just now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_А во-вторых, ты:
And secondly, you heard what they were talking about with that
second frog. He doesn't want to get involved at all!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Если это не Габ: If it's not Gubble, then who is it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не, ты послушай: No, listen! I have proof, I saw everything!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Итак. Для начал:
So. First, I must say that when the whole tribe gathers in the 
square, it is a wonderful time. They are all there and you can 
run down the street without fear of being grabbed by the tail.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вчера вечером,:
Last night when everyone was there to greet you or something,
I realized that this was a great chance to take a walk to the 
garbage pit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я спокойно зани:
I was minding my own business 'cause I knew that I would 
hear in advance when the crowd disperses. 
I had plenty of time and...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_И вдруг я услыш:
And suddenly I heard a quick stomp from behind! I also thought:
“Omg, who's fucking around there!” - and they were heading
straight to the trash pit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я не знаю. Я не: I don't know. I didn’t look, you know, I hid right away.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Понятно, значит:
Got it, that means someone left the square earlier to throw away
some garbage.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да нет же, дуби:
No, you dumbass! I didn't tell you the most important thing!
I hid and then bam!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_И рядом со мной: And then right next to me falls \fithis!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Флакон из под я:
A poison bottle. Exactly the same as those in which Fagop 
stores his shitty poison!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Такая глиняная:
This clay flask with a disgusting image of a rat’s skull.
Empty, but recently uncorked. I could still smell the poison.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ого! Звучит как: Wow! Sounds like a real clue!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, и я про то:
That's what I’m talking about! Roxy found a clue! Then I thought:
“ew, poison, gross!” - and also: “Wow, strange!” - and now I get 
it!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Фагоп убежал с: Fagop ran from the square before others to get rid of this thing!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Хм... нет, это:
Hmm... no, it's not him. When I came to senses, he was there
helping Mary pump me out.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вряд ли он убег:
It is unlikely he ran away the square and then returned. And
he wouldn’t've had time to return. I wasn't off for that long.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Тьфу, облом! Ла:
Ugh, bummer! Okay, it's someone else. But we know how to 
find this someone!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нужно просто вс:
You just need to remember who of the tribe was not there
when you woke up! The one who was not there is the one 
who ran to throw away the empty bottle! The evidence!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да это же нереа:
This is unreal! There was a whole crowd there, who would 
recall that? Anyone could sneak out of the square unnoticed.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, но... я име: Yeah, but... I mean, it's a clue!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, ладно, тебе: Oh, come on, there's no pleasing you!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Брось, Рокси, в:
Come on, Roxy, everything is great! This bottle really is
very important! You're great!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ты поможешь мне: Will you help me get it?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Конечно! Рокси: Certainly! Roxy and Eirik looking for clues! Yay!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Стой! Ты умеешь: Stop! Do you know how to unlock a deadbolt?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*тихо* Ну конеч:
*quietly*
Well, of course he knows how to unlock the bolt, he's got 
hands! And now you can do it, to! \fiRoxy, stop being so weird!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_В общем там две:
You know, there is a door and... I wanted to say - let's go there.
There's a shortcut.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Привет! Ты Эйри: Hello! You're Eirik, right? You look extravagant!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Может это стран:
Maybe this is a strange question, but... Tell me, are you 
attractive? I mean, for other humans, girls mostly. 
Do they think you have the sex appeal?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Плохо. Я на теб: That's bad. I'm not particularly like you.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Почему тебе нуж: Why do you need to be like a human?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Есть одна девуш:
There's this girl, and she... I think it might be that she's into guys
that look more like humans.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вот как? И что,: Is that so? And what, is it serious between you two?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_О да! Супер-сер:
Oh yeah! Super serious! She seriously turns me on!
She is so different from everything that surrounds me here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепчет тебе* О:
*whispering to you*
He hangs around Tina's house all the time.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, Святые корн: Oh, Holy Roots, I didn't notice you... wow!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Чего это он так: Why is he staring at me, Eirik?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Кажется, ты тож:
Looks like you are also different from everything that surrounds 
him!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Нет-нет! Я не к: No, no! I'm not some kind of pervert, I...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не хотите зайти:
Would you like to come visit? My house is to the north from the 
leader's house. Just a step away from his house to the cliff and...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да. Хорошо. Поп: Yes. Fine. We'll try to find time. Thanks for the invitation!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*шепчет тебе* О:
*whispering to you*
He's still  \fistaring\fr at me...
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ладно. Мы пойде: Okay, We'll take our leave now.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Хорошо. Обязате: Fine. Be sure to come visit!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Получается, мес: It turns out that the locals just dump all the garbage here?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ага. Кожура от:
Yeah. Vegetable peels, leaky rags, all that. Here it will rot
and then return to the soil.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да чего такого-:
What's so bad?.. Although, yes, probably it's an \fi "ugh!".\fr
It's just... it's good that it's rotting. Otherwise the whole island
would be littered.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, мир, в кото:
Yes, a world where garbage does not decompose would be 
terrible!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ладно. Теперь н: Okay. Now we need to get the flask.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*наигранно* \"О:
*theatrically*
"Ugh! Ew, garbage, gross, Roxy won't go in there!"
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Но ты же сама т: Didn't you just say that there’s nothing wrong with that!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Не-а! Если тебе:
Nope! If it's "ugh" to you, then it's "ugh" to me, too! Or do you
wanna say that if I am a mouse, then I should dig through the 
garbage? Are you too clean for this?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Вот там! Где-то: Over there! Somewhere in that pile.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ох, да что ты т: Oh, what's the messing around there!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, точно. Я да: Yes, exactly. I even know which slot it went into.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я слишком больш: I'm too big! Okay, one second.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_(Наверное, она: (She probably turned into a mouse and dove \fithere\fr...)
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Славно! Давай,: Nice! Let's get out of here!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_*наигранно* \"Н:
*theatrically*
"Finally, we got out of there, right? It stinks, ugh!"
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Да, я понял, чт: Yes, I get it, you're saying that I am an obnoxious neatnik! Fine!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Ага, вижу. Чист: Yeah, I see. Neatnik with a peel on her head!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Все хорошо! Я в: It's fine! I'll be back! I will find you! Everything is great!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Исчезла... Болв:
Disappeared... You idiot, why did you blurt that out!
She just wanted to fit in!
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Сначала я долже: I've got to find all the clues first.
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Может, хватит с: Maybe you'd rather quit mooning over this bald-pate gal, huh?
dialogs_swamp_camp_caves_Я чуть-чуть поз: I borrowed a little bit of your potion, and look... TA-DAAA!!!
